subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! That which thou hadst repeatedly sent to Our Name Mihdí was read in Our presence, and from it We sensed the fragrance of sorrow
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی قد قرء لدی العرش ما ارسلته الی اسمنا المهدی مره بعد مره و وجدنا
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort
